_meta.description: Marketing and funnel vocabulary contributed by The Sett (Melli Capensi + 12 BG'z). Extends the base Entandra dictionary into AIMS campaign-operational language.

merge_precondition.note: As of verification date, BoomerAng9/BARS-by-ACHIEVEMOR contains only LICENSE.md, POC_GUIDE.md, README.md. No base dictionary exists yet. This patch MUST be treated as a seed — either (a) initialize entandra.json as {"keywords":{}} and apply this patch, or (b) wait for the base 127-keyword Entandra to be committed, then use the collision-detection merge in the README before applying.

changelog.1.1.0: Added target fields to 5 funnel-stage keywords; added stage + role metadata to Tunnel + Chamber for resolver funnel-position awareness; renamed Beacon action from ATTRIBUTION_PIXEL to ATTRIBUTION_SIGNAL (now covers pixel + postback + server-side); added merge_precondition and known_collisions to _meta; stress-test-validated
changelog.1.2.0: Resolved Chamber collision via Path 2 (rename to Sett-Chamber). Updated Funnel.config.stage_names[3] and Journey.config.stages[3] to match. Zero known collisions remaining against documented base.

collisions_resolved.resolution_path: Path 2 — Rename Sett keyword to namespace against base
collisions_resolved.rationale: Preserves Sett TOUCHPOINT semantic without colliding with base CONTAINER_SETUP. Clean merge proven via stress-test Test 4.

Sett.description: Initialize a campaign workspace scaffold — the clan namespace where a funnel is built.

Tunnel.description: Single customer-path through the funnel from Entrance to Exit. Tunnels can branch. Occupies funnel stage 3 (Consideration).

Journey.description: Full-funnel multi-touch sequence spanning all seven Sett stages.

Beacon.description: Conversion tracking signal placed at a funnel stage. Supports pixel, postback, and server-side mechanisms.

Funnel.description: Multi-stage conversion architecture. The core Sett product.

Surface.description: Top-of-funnel awareness layer — where prospects first catch the scent.

Entrance.description: Click-in / interest layer — prospect approaches the tunnel mouth.

Exit.description: Conversion point — prospect emerges transformed (signed, purchased, deployed).

Home-Chamber.description: Retention stage — customer returns to dwell; onboarded and active.

Clan.description: Advocacy stage — customer becomes Sett; brings others, seeds new tunnels.

Dig.description: Audience excavation on first-party and third-party data sources.

Bid.description: Real-time bid submission in a programmatic auction.

Lookalike.description: Similarity-modeled audience expansion from a seed cohort.

Buy-Side.description: Demand-side platform activation for media buying.

Snout.description: Lead and prospect discovery scan — sniffs out opportunities.

Pixel-Drop.description: Deploy a tracking pixel to a customer domain.

First-Party-Fold.description: Ingest first-party CRM audience into the DSP, hashed and consent-verified.

Premium-Craft.description: High-execution craft tier with full review gates.

Region-Adapt.description: Geo-adaptive creative and compliance rotation per region.

Compliance-Gate.description: Privacy-regime compliance check — GDPR, CCPA, LGPD, PIPL, DPDP, etc.

Climb-Stack.description: Traverse the CTV/OTT/DOOH/Audio stack of screen-or-speaker placements.

DOOH-Pin.description: Digital out-of-home placement — geofenced physical-world screen buy.

Mask.description: Persona-based audience overlay on top of a base targeting set.

Batik-Weave.description: Multi-platform social rotation pattern across the open social web.

Micro-Tribe.description: Sub-100k highly-engaged community audience — the niche micro-tribe.

Vertical-Deep.description: Dedicated vertical campaign scaffold — per-vertical messaging and rotation.

Category-Switch.description: Pivot between product categories mid-campaign without funnel rebuild.

Agent-to-Agent-Ad.description: Advertising protocol between AI agents — one agent pitches another on a customer's behalf.

AI-Native-Surface.description: Placement inside an AI-assistant surface — chat ads, assistant-embedded placements.

Emerging-Channel.description: Newly-emerged media channel ingestion and evaluation.

Signal-Read.description: Pre-launch audience-forecast operation across all funnel stages.

Forecast-Funnel.description: Project forecast across all seven funnel stages with confidence intervals.

Attribution-Trail.description: Multi-touch attribution modeling across the funnel.

Brand-Safety-Gate.description: Brand-safety monitoring with real-time crisis flagging.

Fuse-Light.description: Activate a viral-intent campaign mechanism — light the fuse.

Earned-Quake.description: Earned-media amplification sequence — the ripple after the fuse.

Takeover-Stand.description: Physical-world takeover activation — Times Square-class or mobile-billboard convoy.

Viral-Spray.description: Seeded-spread viral pattern — chemical-defense-class unforgettable impact.

Sett-Chamber.description: Single campaign touchpoint — interaction surface inside a tunnel. Occupies funnel stage 4 (Evaluation). Namespaced as `Sett-Chamber` to avoid collision with base `Chamber` (CONTAINER_SETUP / Docker Compose).
